data.name: BootstrapUserLoginAlreadyExistsLog
data.value: Bootstrap user seeding skipped because login '{Login}' already exists.

data.name: BootstrapUserDatabaseAlreadyHasUsersLog
data.value: Bootstrap user seeding skipped because the database already contains users.

data.name: BootstrapUserConcurrentCreationSkippedLog
data.value: Bootstrap HeadCoach user '{Login}' already exists after a concurrent startup attempt. Skipping duplicate creation.

data.name: BootstrapUserCreatedLog
data.value: Bootstrap HeadCoach user '{Login}' has been created with a forced password change.
